info.description: Backend service for SmartLeague. Cookie-based auth (HttpOnly access/refresh cookies).
info.title: SmartLeague API

post.description: Refreshes access and refresh tokens using valid refresh token from cookies

patch.description: Information updating the current user under which the input is executed

get.description: Retrieves a list of users filtered by role, one-line full name query, and email prefix. Only for admins

parameters.description: Max number of users to return
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: One-line search by full name and email tokens (name/surname/email)
parameters.name: q

Set-Cookie.description: user_auth_refresh_token=; expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT; Path=/; HttpOnly

get.description: Get each user by id. Only for admins

patch.description: Update user by id. Only for admins

CookieAuth.description:
Authentication via HttpOnly cookies:
- `user_auth_access_token` (short-lived)
- `user_auth_refresh_token` (long-lived)

Protected endpoints require valid cookies to be sent by the client.
CookieAuth.name: user_auth_access_token
